title: Global Clean Power Alliance: finance mission update (June 2025)
body: "The United Kingdom and Brazil have jointly set out the next steps in the Global Clean Power Alliance Finance Mission which was launched at the G20 summit by Prime Minister Sir Kier Starmer and President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva of Brazil in November 2024.  This update provides further details on the time-bound mission which aims to scale clean energy investments in Emerging Markets and Developing Economies. "
